name: JoAi: Update Private Warp

description.en: Replace the definition of an existing private warp — useful when refining an automation or fixing a flow.
description.de: Ersetze die Definition eines bestehenden privaten Warps — nützlich, um eine Automatisierung zu verfeinern oder einen Flow zu korrigieren.
description.es: Replace the definition of an existing private warp — useful when refining an automation or fixing a flow.
description.fr: Replace the definition of an existing private warp — useful when refining an automation or fixing a flow.
description.ro: Replace the definition of an existing private warp — useful when refining an automation or fixing a flow.
description.it: Replace the definition of an existing private warp — useful when refining an automation or fixing a flow.

bot: Use this when the user wants to update or fix an existing private warp definition. Pass the warp identifier and the full updated definition object.
